active_goal: Improve MemoryOS Lite v3 into a benchmark-usable Letta-style agent memory system for LongMemEval and LoCoMo, without demo-only phase completion, without hiding case-level regressions, and without enabling the v3 kernel by default.

context_bundle.summary: Phase 3 must validate and finish Letta-style core memory blocks in the real MemoryOS v3 context/public benchmark path while preserving v1 fallback and keeping the v3 kernel opt-in.

why_now: The active blueprint requires every lane artifact to cite context_bundle.md and every ACK to include active-goal, implemented-chain, test, review, and case-level evidence.
Existing phase-3 artifacts predate this contract and are stale: they do not cite the context bundle, do not include the active goal, and only report service-level/opt-in evidence.

Current code appears to contain core memory service/store/composer pieces, so execute should start by adding RED contract tests and verifying which behavior is already implemented before changing production code.
failing_tests_required_before_implementa: read-only core block cannot be edited, replaced, appended, or deleted without an explicit allowed contract
over-limit core block create/update is rejected or safely truncated by documented contract
structured core render includes label, description, tags/metadata, source refs, and token cost
v3 build_context includes core layer diagnostics when blocks exist
explicit MEMORYOS_MEMORY_ARCH=v1 fallback does not include v3 core blocks
public benchmark diagnostics preserve v3_layer_counts, v3_budget_decisions, and v3_diagnostics append-only schema
initial_red_commands: uv run pytest tests/test_v3_contracts.py tests/test_core_memory_service.py tests/test_context_composer.py tests/test_engine.py -q
verification_commands: uv run pytest tests/test_v3_contracts.py tests/test_core_memory_store.py tests/test_core_memory_service.py tests/test_context_composer.py tests/test_engine.py -q
benchmark_smoke_commands: MEMORYOS_MEMORY_ARCH=v3 uv run memoryos eval public --benchmark longmemeval --data-path benchmarks/longmemeval/longmemeval.json --baseline memoryos_lite --limit 10 --no-llm-answer --no-llm-judge
MEMORYOS_MEMORY_ARCH=v3 uv run memoryos eval public --benchmark locomo --data-path benchmarks/locomo/locomo10.json --baseline memoryos_lite --limit 10 --no-llm-answer --no-llm-judge
usable_ack_checklist: All plan, execute, result, review, and ACK artifacts cite .hermes-loop/work/phase-3/context_bundle.md.
Core memory block contracts include Letta-style bounded structured fields needed by Phase 3.
Core writes require source refs or approved manual provenance.
v3 context composer consumes structured core blocks and records diagnostics/token budget cost.
10-case LongMemEval and LoCoMo no-LLM v3 smokes are recorded with case-level diagnostics.
No aggregate-only improvement claim is made.
Review lane returns PASS against active goal and anti-demo gate.
review_focus: stale phase artifacts or missing context bundle usage
whether result is real-path usable rather than service-level demo
